rounds.name: Round 1 · 连接词
rounds.description: 转折 / 并列 / 因果 / 对比 / 让步 / 总结

tokens.v: My view is that cultural globalization is not good or bad by itself. Whether a local tradition gains or loses from it depends on one thing: does that culture still hold the pen
it is written into the global story,
is someone else writing it for them?
a culture stays in charge, globalization makes it stronger,
weaker. Korean films first took in ideas from Hollywood
then sent out Parasite and Squid Game. Japanese food traveled around the world
sushi at home kept growing and changing.

more people now know these traditions.
Kelly's warning is also real,
it happens in a different kind of case.
a small language has no TV, no schools, and no market behind it, exposure to a bigger language simply replaces it.
the right question is
open or close,
who holds the pen.

rounds.name: Round 4 · 句法骨架
rounds.description: 整块从句 / 介词短语 / 修饰结构

tokens.v: My view is that cultural globalization is not good or bad by itself. Whether a local tradition gains or loses from it depends on one thing:

tokens.answer: does that culture still hold the pen when it is written into the global story,

tokens.v: or is someone else writing it for them?

tokens.answer: When a culture stays in charge,

tokens.v: globalization makes it stronger, not weaker. Korean films first took in ideas from Hollywood and then sent out Parasite and Squid Game. Japanese food traveled around the world

tokens.answer: while sushi at home kept growing and changing.

tokens.v: In both cases, more people now know these traditions, and

tokens.answer: local chefs and directors were the ones shaping how outsiders saw them.

tokens.v: Kelly's warning is also real, but it happens in a different kind of case.

tokens.answer: When a small language has no TV, no schools, and no market behind it,

tokens.v: exposure to a bigger language simply replaces it. The loss was not caused by exchange itself,

tokens.answer: but by an unequal match in who got to do the telling.

tokens.v: So the right question is

tokens.answer: not open or close, but who holds the pen.
